error_signature: does not use the Data Store
title: RAG workflow not utilizing Data Store
symptom: After uploading a PDF and asking a question, the workflow returns random results or states that information is not available.
not_this_if: Using a different model that supports Data Store
root_cause: The issue arises from using a model that does not properly integrate with the Data Store for retrieving information. In this case, the google/gemma-3-1b model was not compatible, leading to incorrect outputs.
fix_steps: Switch to a compatible model like openai/gpt-oss-29b or google/gemma-3n-e4b
Test the workflow with proper prompts to ensure it retrieves data correctly
agent_instruction: Change the model to openai/gpt-oss-29b or google/gemma-3n-e4b and test the workflow.
